name: berserk
short_effect: Raises this Pokémon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.
effect_text: Whenever this Pokémon takes damage from a move that causes its HP to drop below 50%, its Special Attack rises by one stage.
flavor_text: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat when it takes a hit that causes its HP to drop to half or less.
